methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $600M last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $800M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $3.3B

private.name: Neko Health
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $1.8B

private.name: New Limit

private.name: Asimov
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series B), post-money $800M

data.narrative:
Profluent, a Series B-stage biotech company founded by Ali Madani, has raised $150M to date and carries a last post-money valuation of $600M. The valuation assessment draws on a peer universe of 8 private biotech firms at comparable stage and 3 public-sector comparables in Biotech & Health.

Two triangulation methods prove applicable. Stage-progression analysis, applying a 1.9x multiplier typical of Series B advancement to the $600M base, implies $1.1B. Peer-median analysis across four same-sector, same-stage comparables—Eikon Therapeutics ($3.3B), Neko Health ($1.8B), New Limit ($810M), and Asimov ($800M)—yields a median of $1.3B, with a range of $800M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring, using a Biotech & Health sector P/S multiple of 6.6x across three tickers (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L), cannot be applied absent disclosed revenue. The analysis converges on a range of $969M (low) to $1.5B (high), with a median of $1.2B. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory, clinical or product-validation progress, and the wide dispersion within the peer set (3.3x spread), which reflects heterogeneity in underlying risk profiles and market positioning within the sector.
